articles.title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
articles.description:
Conan O'Brien returned to host the Oscars for a second straight year, poking fun at Netflix, Timothee Chalamet, and most of all, himself.

The post Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Conan O'Brien hosted the Oscars for the second consecutive year on March 15, 2026.
He humorously targeted Netflix and Timothee Chalamet during his monologue.
Boston residents enjoyed local pride as O'Brien continues to represent the city on national stages.

articles.title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
articles.description:
“No family should ever have to face a tragedy like this, nor the emotional and financial burdens that can follow such a sudden loss,” the fundraiser's description reads.

The post Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Community fundraiser launched to support family of Danvers nurse killed at home.
Fundraiser aims to alleviate emotional and financial burdens from the tragedy.
Local residents are encouraged to contribute to help the affected family.

articles.title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
articles.description:
"This team, throughout the year, had a ton of resiliency and dealt with a lot of challenges."

The post Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Northeastern women's hockey team defeats Minnesota, advancing to the Frozen Four.
This marks the team's first Frozen Four appearance since 2021.
Local fans can expect increased support and excitement for the upcoming championship.
